Question: Match the term with its definition or example
Answer:
1) Distance - a) Total path covered by an object
2) Displacement - b) Shortest distance between initial and final position
3) Speed - c) Distance traveled per unit time
4) Velocity - d) Displacement per unit time, includes direction
5) Acceleration - e) Rate of change of velocity
6) Uniform motion - f) Moves equal distances in equal intervals of time
7) Non-uniform motion - g) Moves unequal distances in equal intervals of time
8) Meter - h) SI unit of length
9) Kilometre - i) 1000 meters
10) Time - j) Measured in seconds (s)
11) Stopwatch - k) Device to measure time accurately
12) Odometer - l) Device to measure distance traveled by vehicle
13) Speedometer - m) Device showing speed of vehicle
14) Motion - n) Change in position of an object with time
15) Rest - o) When object does not change position over time
